prompt: There is a much faster sequential-tree predictor in this codebase that first squeezes each feature's continuous values into a small fixed set of buckets before training on them. Where is its class-label producing variant defined, and what shared parent holds the bucketed fitting loop they all reuse?

rubric.answer_shape: one classifier class, one shared parent class

evidence.claim: shared parent with the bucketed fitting loop

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
